creator: shiba-tt@fa2.so-net.ne.jp
text:
I have sent "dmesg.txt" and "lsout.txt" to ftp://ftp.bluestop.org/
incoming" yesterday. 

But procedures taken are a little bit different from your instruction. 
                                Since I could not enter "FIXIT" mode 
                                with LiveFS CD, 
* I start FreeBSD 8.1 with KDE installed on this PC
* Start Terminal console and be Super User
* use "sysinstall" command and go into "FITIT" mode. 

By the way, installation of FreeBSD8.0 did not succeed, but 
installation of FreeBSD8.1 succeeded. So, I thought this problem had 
been already fixed. 


Best Regards, 

>Could you gather some information to help debug this problem please?
>
>Boot using the 8.1 LiveFS CD, enter FixIt mode and set up networking
>using "dhclient <interface_name>" or manually. Once you have an IP
>address configured please collect the following information:
>
>dmesg
>ls /dev
>
>Save these to a file under /tmp and use the 'ftp' program to upload them
>to ftp://ftp.bluestop.org/incoming (you won't be able to see the files
>once uploaded, but the following commands will work for example:
>
>cd /incoming
>put dmesg.txt
>put lsout.txt
>
>-- 
>Bruce Cran
